text: Business ethics is one of the building block of the robust and competitive company, through the activities of strategic planning, rules and procedure, and even the company culture. This research aims to analyze the impact of business ethics at PT. Nesia Pan Pacific Clothing, through the direct observation and the interviews to the employees in several departments. The results shows that the company with strong ethics will be able to improve the performance of the employees, through creating of the good working environment. Good working environment is created through the application of the ethics principles of transparency, fairness, and social responsibility. The application of the ethics principles of transparency, fairness, and social responsibility will increase the employee trust to the company, and thus the employee loyalty to the company will be created. As a result, the company will be able to increase the efficiency of the work, and will be able to improve the quality of the products and services produced by the company.
headline: Fully Human Written
